seoTitle: Minnamurra vs Minnie Water — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Minnamurra and Minnie Water. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Minnamurra vs Minnie Water: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Minnamurra and Minnie Water.
heading: Minnamurra vs Minnie Water — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Minnamurra, New South Wales and Minnie Water, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Minnie Water has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Minnamurra (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Minnamurra or Minnie Water safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Minnamurra has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Minnie Water scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Minnamurra scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Minnie Water scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Minnamurra or Minnie Water?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Minnie Water has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
